name: 喫茶店
position: 主街中央·南侧，花店对面
atmosphere: 温暖怀旧，咖啡香，老唱片机，奶奶留下的店

sensory.sight: 旧木吧台、老咖啡机、窗边座位、奶奶留下的旧菜单和墙上的老照片
sensory.sound: 风铃轻响，杯碟碰到木台面，老唱片机有细微杂音
sensory.smell: 咖啡豆、木头、晒过的窗帘和一点旧纸菜单的味道
sensory.touch: 吧台边缘被磨得光滑，桌椅带着温暖的旧木触感

exterior.prompt: 2D side-view pixel art of a Japanese kissaten coffee shop storefront. Wooden sliding door with glass panels, vintage wooden carved signboard (name faded), warm yellow light spilling from windows. A small wind chime hangs above the door. Two small round tables with chairs on the sidewalk under a traditional Japanese shopping arcade. Red brick and dark wood facade. Morning sunlight casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli background art style, cozy nostalgic atmosphere.
exterior.negative: modern, neon, bright colors, cyberpunk, concrete, stainless steel, 3D, photorealistic

interior.prompt: 2D interior of a cozy Japanese kissaten coffee shop. Wooden counter bar with vintage coffee maker and ceramic cups. Window seat overlooking a shopping street through glass. Two wooden tables, one in a quiet corner with warm lamp light. Old gramophone in the corner. Warm amber lighting, afternoon sun through window. Slightly worn wooden floor. Shelves with old coffee beans jars. Studio Ghibli background art style, cozy nostalgic atmosphere.
interior.negative: modern cafe, espresso machine, bright white lights, minimalism, 3D, photorealistic, crowded

spots.counter: 吧台——奶奶的老咖啡机还在这里，能看见街对面的窗户
spots.window_seat: 靠窗座位——阳光最好的位置，能看见花店门口的花架
spots.table_01: 靠里桌子——隐蔽安静，适合一个人待着
spots.table_02: 中间桌子——上午会被太阳晒得暖洋洋
spots.doorway: 店门口——风铃会响，门口贴着营业时间
spots.kitchen: 后厨——老咖啡机，不大但够用

conversation_hooks: 奶奶以前怎么招待客人
阳光正好适合坐一会儿
这里适合一个人慢慢想事

time_atmosphere.morning: 阳光从东窗斜照进来，吧台上有一层薄薄的光
time_atmosphere.noon: 最热闹的时候，偶尔有邻居进来坐坐
time_atmosphere.evening: 夕阳把整个店染成橙色，影子拉得长长的
time_atmosphere.night: 关了店，一盏小灯亮着，偶尔有猫路过窗外
